titleStmt.title: Tei Dosh(o) daikoku kyushu — nine cliff inscriptions by Zheng Daozhao (rubbing)
鄭道昭題刻九種（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Tei Dosh(o) daikoku kyushu — nine cliff inscriptions by Zheng Daozhao. Holding institution: Daito Bunka University Library 大東文化大学板橋校舎図書館 (provider libdaito, i-repository.net), via Japan Search. Genre: 拓本 (rubbing), 書跡. Image verified HTTP 200 image/jpeg. No per-item IIIF manifest in Japan Search; direct JPG only.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Original carving Northern Wei (北魏); rubbing album (折帖)

bibl.ref: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. Image served live.

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
